zh.lifeSummary: 當Dorothy Tendering於大約1478年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德時，她的父親William de Tendring14歲，母親Thomazine Sidney35歲。她於1503年與Francis Southwell在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1520年在英國英格蘭素福爾可享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dorothy Tendering于大约1478年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德时，她的父亲William de Tendring14岁，母亲Thomazine Sidney35岁。她于1503年与Francis Southwell在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1520年在英国英格兰素福爾可享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

en.lifeSummary: When Dorothy Tendering was born about 1478, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Tendring, was 14 and her mother, Thomazine Sidney, was 35. She married Francis Southwell in 1503, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1520, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dorothy Tendering est née environ 1478, à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Tendring, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Thomazine Sidney, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Francis Southwell en 1503, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1520, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dorothy Tendering um 1478 in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Tendring 14 und ihre Mutter Thomazine Sidney 35. Sie hat 1503 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Francis Southwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1520 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Dorothy Tenderingが約1478年にイギリスイギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドで生まれた時，父William de Tendringは14歳，母Thomazine Sidneyは35歳であった。1503年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでFrancis Southwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1520年にイギリスイギリススフォルクで44歳で死去した。

ko.Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드

ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy Tendering(이)가 대략 1478년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Tendring(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Thomazine Sidney(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1503년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Francis Southwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothy Tendering nasceu aproximadamente 1478, em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Tendring, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Thomazine Sidney, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Francis Southwell em 1503, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1520, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos.

ru.Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England: сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, Unit: сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dorothy Tendering родилась около 1478 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Tendring было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Thomazine Sidney, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Francis Southwell в 1503 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1520 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет.
